Package org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension

package org.moeaframework.algorithm.extension
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.moeaframework.algorithm
    Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
    org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
    Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
    org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
    Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
    org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
    Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
    org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
    Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
  • Class
    Description
    AlgorithmWrapper<T extends Algorithm>
    Wrapper for an algorithm.
    CallbackExtension
    Extension that invokes a callback function every iteration.
    CheckpointExtension
    Adds checkpoint functionality to an algorithm where the state is periodically recorded in a state file.
    Extensible
    Interface for algorithms that support extensibility.
    Extension
    Extensions are a flexible alternative to wrappers when extending or augmenting the functionality of an algorithm.
    Extensions
    A collection of Extension associated with an Algorithm.
    FrequencyType
    Defines the type of frequency.
    LoggingExtension
    Extension that logs information about the execution, including the current NFE and elapsed time.
    PeriodicExtension
    An extension that performs an action at a fixed frequency, specified by its FrequencyType.
    RuntimeCollectorExtension
    Extends an algorithm to record the approximation sets at periodic intervals.
